svg.title: Machine learning complete workflow diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end machine learning workflow: problem definition, data collection, EDA, feature engineering, model selection, training, evaluation, hyperparameter tuning, and deployment.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do you define a machine learning problem — supervised vs unsupervised vs reinforcement?')
sendPrompt('How is data collected and labelled for machine learning?')
sendPrompt('What is exploratory data analysis (EDA) in machine learning?')
sendPrompt('What is feature engineering in machine learning and why does it matter?')
sendPrompt('How do you split data into train, validation, and test sets?')
sendPrompt('What are the main machine learning model families and when do you use each?')
g.text: choose based on data size · interpretability · complexity

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens during model training in machine learning?')
g.text: fit on training set · minimise loss

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do you evaluate a machine learning model and detect overfitting?')
sendPrompt('What is hyperparameter tuning and what methods are used?')
sendPrompt('How do you interpret and explain a trained machine learning model?')
sendPrompt('What does ML model deployment involve — serving, monitoring, drift?')
